message:
fix(tools/bv): correct flag names and add conditional limit handling

Continues the bv CLI flag alignment from internal/bv/bv.go to the
tools/bv.go adapter layer:

Flag name corrections (double-dash to single-dash):
- --alert-type -> -alert-type
- --alert-label -> -alert-label
- --severity -> -severity
- --graph-format -> -graph-format
- --search -> -search
- --search-limit -> -search-limit
- --search-mode -> -search-mode
- --attention-limit -> -attention-limit
- --file-beads-limit -> -file-beads-limit
- --hotspots-limit -> -hotspots-limit
- --relations-limit -> -relations-limit
- --relations-threshold -> -relations-threshold

Conditional limit handling improvements:
- GetLabelAttention: Only add -attention-limit when limit > 0
- GetFileBeads: Only add -file-beads-limit when limit > 0
- GetFileHotspots: Only add -hotspots-limit when limit > 0
- GetFileRelations: Only add -relations-limit and -relations-threshold
  when values are positive

This prevents passing "--flag=0" which some CLI parsers treat as "no limit"
while others treat as "limit of zero results".

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
